---
title: External Skills
description: Curated and installed external agent skills
---

import { Aside, Card, CardGrid, LinkCard } from '@astrojs/starlight/components';
import CatalogSkillFilter from '../../../../../components/CatalogSkillFilter.astro';

External skills are authored in `docs/src/authoring/skills/*.mdx` and emitted to `docs/public/generated-registries/skills-catalog-index.json`. Legacy `config/external-skills.md` remains dual-read during migration. With `--include-installed`, local harness inventory may add rows.

<Aside type="note" title="Trust and provenance">
Audit third-party skills before install. Use [review source](/skills/catalog/custom/review/) and the maintainer notes on each row.
</Aside>

<div class="stats-bar">
  <span class="stat stat-skill">307 External Skills</span>
  <span class="stat stat-installed">127 Install now</span>
  <span class="stat stat-agent">170 Inspect</span>
</div>

<CatalogSkillFilter mode="external" />

## Global only or avoid (10)

<div class="catalog-skill" data-skill-lane="avoid">
<CardGrid>
  <LinkCard title="anthropics-skills-all" href="/skills/catalog/external/anthropics-skills-all/" description="inspect case-by-case; many skills duplicate local/system skills." />
  <LinkCard title="coleam00-excalidraw-diagram-skill-all" href="/skills/catalog/external/coleam00-excalidraw-diagram-skill-all/" description="community Excalidraw skill; prefer `github/awesome-copilot@excalidraw-diagram-generator`." />
  <LinkCard title="find-skills" href="/skills/catalog/external/find-skills/" description="duplicate of `harness-master` discover (systematic gap pipeline)." />
  <LinkCard title="firecrawl-cli-all" href="/skills/catalog/external/firecrawl-cli-all/" description="useful for web research, but requires `FIRECRAWL_API_KEY` and broad network/CLI scope; keep global-only unless explicitly requested." />
  <LinkCard title="github-actions-docs" href="/skills/catalog/external/github-actions-docs/" description="high-install CI/docs reference; keep global-only to avoid bloating the curated sync surface." />
  <LinkCard title="huggingface-skills-all" href="/skills/catalog/external/huggingface-skills-all/" description="keep global unless ML workflows become frequent." />
  <LinkCard title="microsoft-azure-skills-all" href="/skills/catalog/external/microsoft-azure-skills-all/" description="massive Azure bundle; cherry-pick only if a concrete need appears — do not bulk-promote." />
  <LinkCard title="notion-api" href="/skills/catalog/external/notion-api/" description="third-party Notion REST guide; prefer official `makenotion/skills@notion-cli` for catalog promotion." />
  <LinkCard title="stripe-best-practices" href="/skills/catalog/external/stripe-best-practices/" description="registry syntax and provenance still need verification before automated sync/install." />
  <LinkCard title="vercel-labs-agent-browser-all" href="/skills/catalog/external/vercel-labs-agent-browser-all/" description="useful, but broad operational scope and overlaps browser automation." />
</CardGrid>
</div>
